subcodes.first_line: O remnant of the kindred of Ḥusayn! Hearken unto the call of this Wronged One, Who hath been afflicted at the hands of the ungodly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بقیه آل الحسین اسمع ندآء  هذالمظلوم  الذی ابتلی بین یدی المشرکین من
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
